category_sources: Official KhronosGroup repository describes SPIRV-LLVM-Translator as a tool and library for bidirectional translation between SPIR-V and LLVM IR.
source_facts.description says it is a tool and library for bidirectional translation between SPIR-V and LLVM IR.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official KhronosGroup/SPIRV-LLVM-Translator repository.
docs_sources: Official KhronosGroup repository README provides run instructions and usage details for llvm-spirv.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-LLVM-Translator; per instruction repo is returned as null.
